title: Add Three Numbers Within 20
description: Compute the sum of three addends whose total is within 20.
condition: Expression of the form a + b + c where a, b, c are whole numbers within 20.
label: Principle / Model
notes: May involve making a ten as an intermediate step.

title: Add Two Numbers Within 20
description: Compute the sum of two whole numbers whose total is within 20.
condition: Expression of the form a + b where a and b are whole numbers within 20.
label: Principle / Model

title: Decompose Number into Tens and Ones
description: Represent a two-digit number as a sum of tens and ones.
condition: Given a two-digit number less than 100.
response: Express the number as (tens × 10) + ones and state the number of tens and ones.
label: Principle / Model

title: Represent Additive Word Problem with Equation
description: Translate a word problem describing a total of combined quantities into an addition equation.
condition: Word problem describing quantities being combined or counted together.
response: Write an addition equation representing the quantities and compute the total.
label: Rule / Plan
example: 5 shells in hand, 7 on sand, 5 on rocks → $5 + 7 + 5 = 17$.

title: Represent Subtraction Word Problem with Equation
description: Translate a word problem describing a quantity being taken away into a subtraction equation.
condition: Word problem describing an initial quantity and an amount lost or removed.
response: Write a subtraction equation initial − change and compute the result.
label: Rule / Plan

title: Subtract Within 20
description: Compute the difference of two whole numbers within 20.
condition: Expression of the form a - b where a and b are whole numbers within 20 and a ≥ b.
label: Principle / Model
